use crate::config::render::normalize as normalize_fn;

struct Builder();

fn local_helper() {
    println!("helper");
}

pub fn run_direct_import() {
    normalize_fn();
}

pub fn run_same_module() {
    local_helper();
}

pub fn run_local_closure() {
    let callback = || println!("callback");
    callback();
}

pub fn run_constructor() {
    Builder();
}
